---
title: "Publications"
description-meta: "Research publications by Matías Deneken."
page-navigation: true
toc: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="wide-page-shell publications-shell">
  <header class="page-header-minimal" data-lang="en">
    <h1 class="page-title-minimal">Publications</h1>
  </header>

  <header class="page-header-minimal" data-lang="es" style="display:none;">
    <h1 class="page-title-minimal">Publicaciones</h1>
  </header>

  <section class="page-wrap publications-body" data-lang="en">
    <h2 class="section-title-minimal">Book</h2>
    <div class="page-content-wide">
      <article class="publication-entry">
        <h3 class="publication-title"><a href="https://books.google.co.uk/books/about/RE_Configuraciones_Interculturales.html?id=nM6YEQAAQBAJ&amp;redir_esc=y" target="_blank" rel="noopener">(RE) Configuraciones Interculturales: Un estudio longitudinal de las relaciones entre indígenas y no indígenas en Chile (2016–2024)</a></h3>
        <p class="publication-summary">Book based on the Longitudinal Study of Intercultural Relations (ELRI), 2016–2023.</p>
        <dl class="publication-meta">
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Authors</dt>
            <dd>Matías Deneken, Eduardo Valenzuela, CIIR</dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Publisher</dt>
            <dd>Editorial Catalonia, 2025</dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>ISBN</dt>
            <dd>9789564151809 (9564151805)</dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Pages</dt>
            <dd>328</dd>
          </div>
        </dl>
      </article>
    </div>

    <h2 class="section-title-minimal">Journal articles</h2>
    <div class="page-content-wide">
      <article class="publication-entry">
        <h3 class="publication-title">La “sociología camuflada” en ARCIS (1984–1991): Crítica, compromiso y militancia</h3>
        <dl class="publication-meta">
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Authors</dt>
            <dd>Vicente Maltrain Silva, Juan Cristóbal Cárdenas-Castro, Mónica Iglesias Vázquez, Matías Deneken Uribe</dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Published</dt>
            <dd>2023</dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Journal</dt>
            <dd><em>Izquierdas</em></dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Issue</dt>
            <dd>52</dd>
          </div>
        </dl>
      </article>

      <article class="publication-entry">
        <h3 class="publication-title">Entre la Reforma Universitaria y la Vía Chilena al Socialismo: una breve historia del Centro de Estudios de la Realidad Nacional (CEREN) (1968–1973)</h3>
        <dl class="publication-meta">
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Authors</dt>
            <dd>Matías Deneken</dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Published</dt>
            <dd>December 31, 2024</dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Journal</dt>
            <dd><em>Temas Sociológicos</em></dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Issue</dt>
            <dd>35</dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Pages</dt>
            <dd>81–111</dd>
          </div>
        </dl>
      </article>
    </div>

    <h2 class="section-title-minimal">Working paper</h2>
    <div class="page-content-wide">
      <article class="publication-entry">
        <h3 class="publication-title">Apertura normativa y contención fallida: estallido social, estado de excepción y justificación de la violencia entre personas indígenas y no indígenas en Chile (2018–2023)</h3>

        <div class="publication-authors-block">
          <p class="publication-authors-label">Authors</p>
          <ul class="publication-authors-list">
            <li class="publication-author">
              <span class="publication-author-name">Matías Deneken</span>
              <span class="publication-author-affiliations">Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile · Observatorio de Violencia y Legitimidad Social (OLES)</span>
            </li>
            <li class="publication-author">
              <span class="publication-author-name">Federico Díaz</span>
              <span class="publication-author-affiliations">Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile</span>
            </li>
            <li class="publication-author">
              <span class="publication-author-name">Monica M. Gerber</span>
              <span class="publication-author-affiliations">Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile · Observatorio de Violencia y Legitimidad Social (OLES)</span>
            </li>
            <li class="publication-author">
              <span class="publication-author-name">Roberto González</span>
              <span class="publication-author-affiliations">Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile</span>
            </li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </article>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="page-wrap publications-body" data-lang="es" style="display:none;">
    <h2 class="section-title-minimal">Libro</h2>
    <div class="page-content-wide">
      <article class="publication-entry">
        <h3 class="publication-title"><a href="https://books.google.co.uk/books/about/RE_Configuraciones_Interculturales.html?id=nM6YEQAAQBAJ&amp;redir_esc=y" target="_blank" rel="noopener">(RE) Configuraciones Interculturales: Un estudio longitudinal de las relaciones entre indígenas y no indígenas en Chile (2016–2024)</a></h3>
        <p class="publication-summary">Libro basado en el Estudio Longitudinal de Relaciones Interculturales (ELRI) entre 2016 y 2023.</p>
        <dl class="publication-meta">
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Autores</dt>
            <dd>Matías Deneken, Eduardo Valenzuela, CIIR</dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Editorial</dt>
            <dd>Editorial Catalonia, 2025</dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>ISBN</dt>
            <dd>9789564151809 (9564151805)</dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Páginas</dt>
            <dd>328</dd>
          </div>
        </dl>
      </article>
    </div>

    <h2 class="section-title-minimal">Artículos</h2>
    <div class="page-content-wide">
      <article class="publication-entry">
        <h3 class="publication-title">La “sociología camuflada” en ARCIS (1984–1991): Crítica, compromiso y militancia</h3>
        <dl class="publication-meta">
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Autores</dt>
            <dd>Vicente Maltrain Silva, Juan Cristóbal Cárdenas-Castro, Mónica Iglesias Vázquez, Matías Deneken Uribe</dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Fecha de publicación</dt>
            <dd>2023</dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Revista</dt>
            <dd><em>Izquierdas</em></dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Número</dt>
            <dd>52</dd>
          </div>
        </dl>
      </article>

      <article class="publication-entry">
        <h3 class="publication-title">Entre la Reforma Universitaria y la Vía Chilena al Socialismo: una breve historia del Centro de Estudios de la Realidad Nacional (CEREN) (1968–1973)</h3>
        <dl class="publication-meta">
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Autores</dt>
            <dd>Matías Deneken</dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Fecha de publicación</dt>
            <dd>2024/12/31</dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Revista</dt>
            <dd><em>Temas Sociológicos</em></dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Número</dt>
            <dd>35</dd>
          </div>
          <div class="publication-meta-row">
            <dt>Páginas</dt>
            <dd>81–111</dd>
          </div>
        </dl>
      </article>
    </div>

    <h2 class="section-title-minimal">Working paper</h2>
    <div class="page-content-wide">
      <article class="publication-entry">
        <h3 class="publication-title">Apertura normativa y contención fallida: estallido social, estado de excepción y justificación de la violencia entre personas indígenas y no indígenas en Chile (2018–2023)</h3>

        <div class="publication-authors-block">
          <p class="publication-authors-label">Autores/as</p>
          <ul class="publication-authors-list">
            <li class="publication-author">
              <span class="publication-author-name">Matías Deneken</span>
              <span class="publication-author-affiliations">Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile · Observatorio de Violencia y Legitimidad Social (OLES)</span>
            </li>
            <li class="publication-author">
              <span class="publication-author-name">Federico Díaz</span>
              <span class="publication-author-affiliations">Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile</span>
            </li>
            <li class="publication-author">
              <span class="publication-author-name">Monica M. Gerber</span>
              <span class="publication-author-affiliations">Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile · Observatorio de Violencia y Legitimidad Social (OLES)</span>
            </li>
            <li class="publication-author">
              <span class="publication-author-name">Roberto González</span>
              <span class="publication-author-affiliations">Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile</span>
            </li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </article>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>

<style>
.wide-page-shell {
  max-width: 1400px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 2rem 3rem;
}

.publications-shell .page-wrap {
  max-width: none;
  padding: 0;
}

.publications-body {
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
}

.page-content-wide {
  padding: 0.5rem 0 2rem;
}

.publication-entry {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0 0 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08));
}

.publication-entry:last-child {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.publication-title {
  margin: 0 0 1rem;
  font-family: var(--font-editorial, "Playfair Display", Georgia, serif);
  font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 2.2vw, 1.55rem);
  font-weight: 400;
  line-height: 1.35;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
  text-transform: none;
  color: var(--ink, #0f0f14);
}

.publication-title a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
  border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
  transition: border-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;
}

.publication-title a:hover,
.publication-title a:focus {
  color: var(--accent, #6c5ce7);
  border-bottom-color: var(--accent, #6c5ce7);
}

.publication-summary {
  margin: 0 0 1rem;
  max-width: 52rem;
  font-size: 0.98rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: var(--ink-muted, #52526a);
}

.publication-meta {
  margin: 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.55rem;
}

.publication-meta-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(7rem, 11rem) 1fr;
  gap: 0.75rem 1.5rem;
  align-items: baseline;
}

.publication-meta dt {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: var(--font-ui, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--ink-faint, #9898b0);
}

.publication-meta dd {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
  color: var(--ink-muted, #52526a);
}

.publication-authors-block {
  width: 100%;
}

.publication-authors-label {
  margin: 0 0 0.65rem;
  font-family: var(--font-ui, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--ink-faint, #9898b0);
}

.publication-authors-list {
  list-style: none;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.85rem;
}

.publication-author {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(10rem, 14rem) 1fr;
  gap: 0.75rem 1.5rem;
  align-items: baseline;
}

.publication-author-name {
  font-size: 0.98rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--ink, #0f0f14);
  line-height: 1.4;
}

.publication-author-affiliations {
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
  color: var(--ink-muted, #52526a);
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .wide-page-shell {
    padding: 1.5rem 1rem;
  }

  .publication-author,
  .publication-meta-row {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 0.2rem;
  }
}
</style>
```
